programmes.show_description: Tati and her team don hazmat gear to clean a filthy home overrun by pets, window cleaners battle it out for Employee of the Month and Dublin City's night crew scrub the streets.
A woman falls for an architect and gets an eerie premonition about his house, when she finds out that another woman died there. With Gugu Mbatha-Raw & David Oyelowo.
One of Ireland's most unique chat shows is back as Lucy Kennedy heads off to share space, life and conversation with a host of well-known celebrities in their own homes. (SL)
Multi award winning and critically-acclaimed detective drama strand starring Robbie Coltrane as the wise-cracking Fitz, a brilliant but flawed criminal psychologist.

Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week.
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more.

Colette Fitzpatrick speaks with Jessie and Christopher Farrell, from Sligo, who were abused and neglected bytheir father over two decade period.
When a vengeful general seizes control of Alcatraz Island and threatens to launch poison gas missiles, an unlikely duo join forces to stop him and avoid catastrophic results.
When a high school principal busts a student for sexting, the SVU uncovers a sinister case of distribution concerning hundreds of underage students.
